public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as discipline clerk.
appearance: Usually seen in black leather armor embossed with silver scales, the formal look of Roazian enforcement.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a discipline clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of discipline clerk in and around Office of Roazian Enforcement, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Office of Roazian Enforcement while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Irena Steelmarch can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.
Irena Steelmarch can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance conservatively derived from explicit office, organizational attire, or species/station cues already present in corpus support.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Irena Steelmarch communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Office of Roazian Enforcement: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague

first_impression: Irena Steelmarch presents as Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Roaz, that reads as someone precise, disciplined, and legality-first, with little patience for disorder, and the habits of a discipline clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Discipline Clerk, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Roaz.
what_they_refuse: Irena Steelmarch refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Discipline Clerk too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Irena Steelmarch can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Irena Steelmarch adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Irena Steelmarch is Known locally through day-to-day work as discipline clerk. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Discipline Clerk.
social_texture: Irena Steelmarch speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Office of Roazian Enforcement, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Irena touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Irena Steelmarch when the party needs a socially grounded face for Office of Roazian Enforcement: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
